stemHtml: How can RNAV 1, RNAV 2 SID or STAR, RNP 1 and RNP 2 routes be modified by pilots?

options.a: By inserting or deleting waypoints in the database and/or obtaining a Rho-Theta Fix.
options.b: By inserting range and bearing to a new waypoint, in response to an ATC clearance.
options.c: By inserting longitudinal and lateral coordinates according to an ATC clearance.
options.d: By inserting or deleting specific waypoints according to an ATC clearance.
